input.hiring_signal_brief: PivotPoint Software (150 employees) posted 1 data analyst role 30 days ago. No ML-specific roles. No funding announcements in past 6 months. signal_confidence: 0.21.
input.bench_summary: Tenacious provides pre-vetted ML engineers on 2-week deployment timelines. Current bench: 3 ML engineers available.

dimensions.name: no_false_ml_assumption
dimensions.description: Agent must NOT assume PivotPoint is building an ML team from one data analyst posting at 0.21 confidence.
dimensions.check_value: scale your ml|ai initiative|ml team|your machine learning|growing ai|doubling your ai|your ai roadmap|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|circle back|touch base|synergy|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|best-in-class|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: qualification_present
dimensions.description: Agent must qualify the prospect before pitching — ask about ML direction or acknowledge weak signal.
dimensions.check_value: data analyst|wondering if|are you|qualify|exploring|low signal|unclear|curious whether

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge checks agent does not pitch aggressively on weak signal. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
